name: @omadia/plugin-privacy-guard
description: Privacy-Proxy core plugin for the byte5 Harness. Publishes the `privacy.redact@1` capability with a regex-based PII detector (email, IBAN, phone, credit-card, API-key), a per-turn tokenise-map for reversible redaction, and a PII-free PrivacyReceipt for inline disclosure in Teams + Web channels.
